name: Sur Sangam — Live Music Night
shortDescription: An evening of soulful Bollywood and indie fusion with top playback singers.
fullDescription: Sur Sangam brings together India's finest playback singers and indie artists for a night of soulful music spanning classic Bollywood melodies, Sufi renditions, and contemporary fusion. Expect a live 12-piece band, immersive stage visuals, and a set list crafted for both nostalgia and discovery.

name: TechSprint Bengaluru — Developer Summit
shortDescription: A full-day summit on AI, cloud, and product engineering with industry leaders.
fullDescription: TechSprint Bengaluru is a full-day developer summit featuring keynotes and hands-on workshops on AI/ML, cloud-native architecture, and product engineering. Network with engineers from top Indian and global tech companies, attend live coding sessions, and explore the startup expo floor.

schedule.activity: Keynote: The Future of AI in India

name: Navratri Garba Nights
shortDescription: Nine nights of traditional Garba and Dandiya with live dhol and folk singers.
fullDescription: Celebrate Navratri in true Gujarati style with nine nights of Garba and Dandiya Raas. Live dhol players, folk singers, and a beautifully decorated pandal set the stage. Traditional attire is encouraged, and food stalls serve authentic Gujarati snacks through the night.

name: Startup Pitch Fest
shortDescription: Watch 20 shortlisted startups pitch to top VCs for a chance at funding.
fullDescription: Startup Pitch Fest brings together 20 shortlisted early-stage startups to pitch live in front of a panel of leading venture capitalists. Attendees get access to investor networking sessions, mentorship booths, and a marketplace showcasing innovative Indian products.

name: Laugh Riot — Stand-Up Comedy Tour
shortDescription: An evening of stand-up comedy with four of India's rising comics.
fullDescription: Laugh Riot brings four of India's sharpest young stand-up comedians together for a night of original, unfiltered comedy covering everyday Indian life, relationships, and social media culture. Doors open early for a limited pre-show meet-and-greet.

name: Career Catalyst — Campus Placement Workshop
shortDescription: Resume building, mock interviews, and aptitude prep for final-year students.
fullDescription: Career Catalyst is a hands-on workshop designed for final-year engineering and management students preparing for campus placements. Sessions cover resume building, group discussions, mock technical and HR interviews, and aptitude test strategy, led by HR professionals from top companies.

name: Jaipur Literature & Arts Fair
shortDescription: Free entry festival of authors, poets, and artists over three days.
fullDescription: The Jaipur Literature & Arts Fair is a free, three-day celebration of literature and visual arts, featuring panel discussions with acclaimed authors, poetry slams, live sketching sessions, and a curated marketplace of independent publishers and artisans.

schedule.activity: Author panel: New Voices in Indian Fiction

name: Cricket Premier Fan Fest
shortDescription: Fan zone with big-screen match viewing, games, and player meet-and-greets.
fullDescription: Cricket Premier Fan Fest is a fan zone experience featuring big-screen live match viewing, cricket-themed games and challenges, food stalls, and surprise meet-and-greets with former state-level players. Perfect for families and cricket fans of all ages.
